所有程序包的分层结构

程序包分层结构:
  • com.android,
  • com.android.advance,
  • com.android.decode,
  • com.android.decode.configuration,
  • com.android.device,
  • com.android.device.configuration,
  • com.android.device.input

类分层结构

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.android.advance.AdvanceManager
    • com.android.decode.Barcode (implements com.android.decode.DecodeResult)
    • com.android.decode.BarcodeDefaults (implements com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGetter)
    • com.android.decode.BarcodeManager (implements com.android.device.configuration.PropertyEditor)
    • com.android.decode.CapturedFrame
    • com.android.device.ErrorManager
    • com.android.ExampleInstrumentedTest
    • com.android.ExampleUnitTest
    • com.android.device.input.KeyboardManager
    • com.android.device.input.KeyCodeEntry
    • com.android.device.configuration.Property<T>
      • com.android.device.configuration.BooleanProperty
      • com.android.device.configuration.CharacterProperty
      • com.android.device.configuration.EnumProperty<E>
      • com.android.device.configuration.NumericProperty
      • com.android.device.configuration.TextProperty
    • com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGroup
      • com.android.decode.configuration.AutoScan
      • com.android.decode.configuration.ClipboardWedge
      • com.android.decode.configuration.DecodingNotification
      • com.android.decode.configuration.Digimarc
      • com.android.decode.configuration.DisplayNotification
      • com.android.decode.configuration.Formatting
      • com.android.decode.configuration.FrameCaptureConfiguration
      • com.android.decode.configuration.GoodRead
      • com.android.decode.configuration.IntentWedge
      • com.android.decode.configuration.Inverse
      • com.android.decode.configuration.KeyboardWedge
      • com.android.decode.configuration.KeyboardWedgeExternal
      • com.android.decode.configuration.LinearQuietZones
      • com.android.decode.configuration.MultiScan
      • com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerOptions
      • com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
      • com.android.decode.configuration.SymbologyBase
        • com.android.decode.configuration.Composite
        • com.android.decode.configuration.Ean13
        • com.android.decode.configuration.Ean8
        • com.android.decode.configuration.Gs1DataBar_14
        • com.android.decode.configuration.Gs1DataBar_Limited
        • com.android.decode.configuration.PostalAustralian
        • com.android.decode.configuration.PostalJapan
        • com.android.decode.configuration.PostalKix
        • com.android.decode.configuration.PostalRoyalMail
        • com.android.decode.configuration.PostalUsPlanet
        • com.android.decode.configuration.PostalUsPostnet
        • com.android.decode.configuration.PostalUsps4State
        • com.android.decode.configuration.SymbologyLengths
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Aztec
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Codabar
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Code128
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Code39
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Code93
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Datamatrix
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Discrete25
          • com.android.decode.configuration.DotCode
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Gs1DataBar_Expanded
          • com.android.decode.configuration.HanXin
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Interleaved25
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Matrix25
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Maxicode
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Micropdf417
          • com.android.decode.configuration.MicroQR
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Msi
          • com.android.decode.configuration.Pdf417
          • com.android.decode.configuration.QRCode
        • com.android.decode.configuration.UpcA
        • com.android.decode.configuration.UpcE
      • com.android.decode.configuration.UpcEanExtensions
    • com.android.decode.PropertyID
    • com.android.decode.SavedFrame
    • ScanCode
      • com.android.device.input.KeyboardManager.VScanCode
    • java.lang.Throwable (implements java.io.Serializable)
      • java.lang.Exception
        • java.lang.RuntimeException
          • com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException
          • com.android.decode.DecodeException
          • com.android.device.DeviceException
    • com.android.device.input.VScanEntry

接口分层结构

  • com.android.decode.DecodeResult
  • com.android.decode.FrameCaptureListener
  • com.android.decode.FrameSaveListener
  • com.android.device.configuration.PropertyGetter
    • com.android.device.configuration.PropertyEditor
  • com.android.decode.ReadListener
  • com.android.decode.StartListener
  • com.android.decode.StopListener
  • com.android.decode.TimeoutListener

枚举分层结构

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.lang.Enum<E> (implements java.lang.Comparable<T>, java.io.Serializable)
      • com.android.decode.configuration.KeyWedgeMode
      • com.android.decode.configuration.DatamatrixOpMode
      • com.android.decode.configuration.CharacterSetMode
      • com.android.decode.configuration.FrameCaptureMode
      • com.android.decode.configuration.LengthControlMode
      • com.android.decode.configuration.IntentDeliveryMode
      • com.android.decode.configuration.FrameCaptureFormat
      • com.android.decode.configuration.UpcEanCompositeMode
      • com.android.decode.configuration.ImageCaptureProfile
      • com.android.decode.BarcodeID
      • com.android.decode.configuration.Code128Aggressiveness
      • com.android.decode.Symbology
      • com.android.device.ErrorManager.EMSingleton
      • com.android.decode.configuration.BeamMode
      • com.android.decode.configuration.Isbt128Mode
      • com.android.decode.configuration.InverseMode
